description: Partial LoRA carrier generation on hugo branch (abandoned in favor of Redwood-only dataset redesign)

files.lora_carriers.jsonl: Raw generation output (151 rows at time of kill)
files.lora_carriers_filtered.jsonl: Audit-filtered output (270 rows from earlier run)

notes: Abandoned per team decision to use Redwood methods only with paired stego/clean design. TrojanStego token_bucket encoding deemed too hard for LLM to decode.
